name: daily monitor honors the daily-fresh fetch guarantee and skips a source already fetched within the freshness window
command:
mkdir -p pr-corpus .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/last-fetch && printf '{"gate":"pass"}
' > pr-corpus/quality-eval.json && printf '2026-05-13T00:00:00Z
' > .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/last-fetch/cfpb.txt && printf 'sources: [{id: cfpb, source_class: federal-financial-regulator, tier: 1, applies_to: [node]}]
' > fixtures/sources.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/monitor.sh" --gate-result pr-corpus/quality-eval.json --once --sources fixtures/sources.yaml --now 2026-05-13T01:00:00Z 2>out.txt && grep -q 'source=cfpb status=fresh-skip' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
